meta.notes: Each test case ran as a separate exec call. T1/T3 fast (~4.5s LLM each). T2 slower (14.5s, Instagram long-form caption). T4 variations=3 triggered known truncation bug: first LLM pass (28s) produced malformed JSON array (truncated mid-caption), fell back to single-variation second pass (14.5s). v1.0.7 includes dynamic max_tokens fix — bug still reproducible at this token budget. system_prompt_tokens = first-turn cacheRead.

test_input.name: pasta-tutorial-brief
test_input.description: video tutorial: how to cook perfect pasta at home — tested 5 different techniques

task.name: social-posting
task.purpose: Generate platform-optimized captions + hashtags for a cooking tutorial video
task.expected_output: JSON with caption, hashtags, full_post per test case; T4 expects 3 variations

install.notes: SP v1.0.7 already installed. CMS fetch only (0.125s).

asset_acquisition.notes: N/A — pure LLM skill, no downloads

steps.name: t1_x_casual
steps.notes: exit=0 llm_s=4.5 caption_len=177 hashtags=2. X short-form, punchy. No warnings.

steps.name: t2_instagram_casual
steps.notes: exit=0 llm_s=14.5 caption_len=846 hashtags=27. Instagram long-form with story arc. No warnings.

steps.name: t3_tiktok_funny
steps.notes: exit=0 llm_s=4.5 caption_len=78 hashtags=4. TikTok short hook. No warnings.

steps.name: t4_instagram_variations3
steps.notes: exit=0 llm_s=28.0+14.5=42.5 variations_returned=1 (expected 3). ⚠️ Variations truncation: first LLM pass (28s) returned malformed JSON array (truncated mid-caption at token limit). Fell back to single-variation second pass (14.5s). Known bug — dynamic max_tokens fix in v1.0.7 still insufficient for 3 variations.

execution.notes: T4 variations bug confirmed still present in v1.0.7. T1+T3 fast (X/TikTok short-form ~4.5s). T2 slow (Instagram 14.5s, long-form). T4 double-LLM-call due to truncation+retry.
